title: ornithogalum pyramidale subsp. narbonense
intro: Ornithogalum pyramidale subsp. narbonense, also known as the Narbonne Chive Flower or White Star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Hyacinth family (Asparagaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which help to ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ornithogalum pyramidale subsp. narbonense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
